phrases.intent_en: Ask where the market information desk is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o balcão de informações?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH?
phrases.cultural_note: Information desks centralize assistance near main entries for efficiency.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o balcão de informações.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the information desk.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the information desk.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o balcão de informações.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o piso superior com restaurantes?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW PEE-zoo soo-peh-REEOHR KOHM rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tihsh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o piso superior do mercado.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW PEE-zoo soo-peh-REEOHR DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: Where is the upper floor with restaurants? Follow the signs to the upper floor of the market.

responses.english: Where is the upper floor with restaurants? Follow the signs to the upper floor of the market.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW PEE-zoo soo-peh-REEOHR DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o piso superior do mercado.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the traditional cheese section is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a secção de queijos tradicionais?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SEH-sown DIH KAY-zhoosh truh-dee-seeoo-NEYESH?
phrases.cultural_note: Cheese vendors often provide samples and pairings with regional wines.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, siga as placas para a secção de queijos tradicionais.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SEH-sown DIH KAY-zhoosh truh-dee-seeoo-NEYESH.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, follow the signs to the traditional cheese section.

responses.english: Good morning, follow the signs to the traditional cheese section.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SEH-sown DIH KAY-zhoosh truh-dee-seeoo-NEYESH.
responses.french: Bom dia, siga as placas para a secção de queijos tradicionais.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the fresh fish counters are
phrases.text_local: Por favor, onde ficam as bancas de peixe fresco?
phrases.pronunciation: POOR fuh-VOHR, OHNG-dih FEE-kuhng UHSH BAHNNG-kuhsh DIH PAY-shih FREHSH-koo?
phrases.cultural_note: Fish counters operate early morning to ensure peak freshness for locals.

likely_response.local: Peça ajuda a um vendedor para localizar a banca exata.
likely_response.pronunciation: PEH-suh uh-ZHOO-duh AH OONNG vayng-dih-DOHR PUH-ruh loo-kuh-lee-ZAHR AH BAHNNG-kuh eh-ZAH-tuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask a vendor for help locating the exact counter.

responses.english: Ask a vendor for help locating the exact counter.
responses.phonetic: PEH-suh uh-ZHOO-duh AH OONNG vayng-dih-DOHR PUH-ruh loo-kuh-lee-ZAHR AH BAHNNG-kuh eh-ZAH-tuh.
responses.french: Peça ajuda a um vendedor para localizar a banca exata.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the market information desk is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o balcão de informações?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH?
phrases.cultural_note: Market staff are usually willing to provide directions.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o balcão de informações.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the information desk.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the information desk.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o balcão de informações.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a secção de queijos tradicionais?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SEH-sown DIH KAY-zhoosh truh-dee-seeoo-NEYESH?

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the upper dining terrace is
phrases.text_local: Podem dizer-me onde está o terraço de refeições no andar de cima?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dayng dee-ZEHR-MIH OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AW teh-RAH-soo DIH reh-fay-SOHNYSH NOO ahnng-DAHR DIH SEE-muh?
phrases.cultural_note: Upper terraces offer traditional views and local cuisine setups.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, está no piso superior, ao fundo.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ehs-TAH NOO PEE-zoo soo-peh-REEOHR, OW FOONNG-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's on the upper floor, at the back.

responses.english: Good morning, it's on the upper floor, at the back.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ehs-TAH NOO PEE-zoo soo-peh-REEOHR, OW FOONNG-doo.
responses.french: Bom dia, está no piso superior, ao fundo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the azulejo entrance is
phrases.text_local: Bom dia, onde fica a entrada principal com azulejos?
phrases.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH ayngt-RAH-duh preen-see-PAHL KOHM uh-zoo-LEH-zhoosh?
phrases.cultural_note: The azulejo-tiled entrance is a historic landmark; asking directly is fine.

likely_response.local: É a entrada principal, à direita.
likely_response.pronunciation: EH AH ayngt-RAH-duh preen-see-PAHL, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
likely_response.translation_en: It's the main entrance, on the right.

responses.english: It's the main entrance, on the right.
responses.phonetic: EH AH ayngt-RAH-duh preen-see-PAHL, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
responses.french: É a entrada principal, à direita.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the upper floor dining terrace is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o terraço gastronómico no piso superior?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW teh-RAH-soo guhsht-roo-NAW-mee-koo NOO PEE-zoo soo-peh-REEOHR?
phrases.cultural_note: Upper dining areas blend traditional market vibes with modern seating.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o terraço.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW teh-RAH-soo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the terrace.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the terrace.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW teh-RAH-soo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o terraço.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o terraço de refeições do piso superior?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW teh-RAH-soo DIH reh-fay-SOHNYSH DOO PEE-zoo soo-peh-REEOHR?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o terraço de refeições no piso superior.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW teh-RAH-soo DIH reh-fay-SOHNYSH NOO PEE-zoo soo-peh-REEOHR.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the dining terrace on the upper floor.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the dining terrace on the upper floor.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW teh-RAH-soo DIH reh-fay-SOHNYSH NOO PEE-zoo soo-peh-REEOHR.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o terraço de refeições no piso superior.
